user_story: As a Manager, I want to search employee performance review ratings by review period, so that I can review ratings for a specific timeframe
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Performance Review Ratings screen; When I set a review period start and end date and click Search; Then only ratings within that period are listed

user_story: As a Manager, I want to filter review ratings by status (All, Pending submission, Closed), so that I can focus on records in a particular state
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Performance Review Ratings screen; When I select a status from the Status filter and click Search; Then only records with that status are displayed

user_story: As a Manager, I want to reset the search filters, so that I can clear my criteria and start a new query
acceptance_criteria: Given I have applied review period and status filters; When I click Reset; Then all filters are cleared and the default list is restored

user_story: As a Manager, I want to view review ratings in a list with review period from, review period to, status and task columns, so that I can quickly scan each employee's review at a glance
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Performance Review Ratings screen; When results are returned; Then each row shows review period from, review period to, status and task

user_story: As a Manager, I want to open the calendar to pick start and end dates, so that I can accurately choose the review period boundaries
acceptance_criteria: Given I am setting the review period; When I click Open the calendar for start or end; Then a calendar appears and lets me select a date

user_story: As a Manager, I want to refresh the ratings list, so that I always see the latest submitted review data
acceptance_criteria: Given the ratings list is displayed; When I click Refresh; Then the list reloads with current data
